description_long: This object is a heart-shaped pendant with a raised, textured surface. The front face is adorned with a pattern of small, round, gold-like studs set against a deep reddish-purple background, giving it a luxurious and ornate appearance. The border and back of the pendant are a metallic brown, likely representing a gold or bronze material, with the back featuring a similar but less colorful studded texture. The pendant is relatively flat and solid, with no visible openings or moving parts. Its design suggests it is intended to be worn as a decorative accessory, possibly on a necklace. The overall craftsmanship appears detailed, with a focus on intricate surface embellishments.
description: A heart-shaped pendant with a gold-studded, reddish-purple front and a metallic brown back, featuring intricate surface detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pendant's thickness and the raised gold studs on the front face.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the ornate gold-studded pattern on the reddish-purple surface.
description_view_2: Angled rear view displaying the metallic brown back with a subtle studded texture.
description_view_3: Direct back view showing the plain metallic brown surface with raised dots.
